# Tables

This section is driven by `catalog/tables.csv`. Pipeline-rendered reports
receive compact input registries and summaries; final assessment tables can be
added as CSV files under `tables/` or `Tables/` using the names listed in the
catalog.

```{r table-catalog, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
table_catalog <- read_catalog("tables")
table_roots <- report_paths("table_roots", c("pipeline-inputs", "tables/generated", "tables", "Tables"))
emit_catalog_tables(table_catalog, roots = table_roots)
emit_extra_generated_tables(
  table_catalog,
  roots = report_paths("extra_table_roots", c("tables/generated"))
)
```
